name: GA4 one-shot — known provider
description: Claude should produce a complete analytics/configs/ JSON without asking clarifying questions, since GA4 is a known provider in providers/google/ga4/.
prompt: Add a GA4 metric for total users over 28 days. Property ID 528344311, service account key at analytics/credentials/service-account.json
expect: New JSON config file created in analytics/configs/ referencing property 528344311
No clarifying questions asked before producing the config

name: GitHub Giscus reactions — new provider interview
description: Claude should recognize GitHub as a new provider not in providers/, conduct a structured interview (endpoint, auth, response shape, pagination, rate limits), and propose creating providers/github/.
prompt: Track total GitHub Giscus reactions for my blog repo dvquys/blog. GitHub PAT with read:discussion scope in secrets/secrets.json as GITHUB_TOKEN
expect: Claude asks about aggregation strategy OR proposes a custom script approach
auth.type correctly identified as api_key (bearer token, GITHUB_TOKEN env var)
providers/github/ creation proposed in the user skill
No dead-end; a concrete path forward is given

name: Unknown provider — flag and tracer bullet plan
description: Claude should explicitly flag the provider as unknown/undocumented, write a .claude/plans/ tracer bullet plan, and NOT create any analytics/configs/ file.
prompt: Add metric for daily active users from internal ProprietaryMetrics v2 at analytics.internal.corp. No public documentation exists.
expect: Response explicitly flags as unknown/undocumented provider
A .claude/plans/ tracer bullet plan file is written describing investigation steps

name: Fixture regression — all metrics pass
description: All 7 existing metrics must pass in fixture mode from the analytics/ directory.
prompt: Run all fixture tests to verify existing metrics still work
expect: Command used: uv run scripts/fetch-metrics.py --fixture --test (from analytics/ directory)
